quiet-zone.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the qr component for the quiet zone: M3 ships no QR-code component (spec Assumptions, same absence class as avatar), so the theme applies a generous 16dp light margin as a theme-author decision — scanner headroom on the rounded tile; module and tile colors inherit the scheme-stable dark-on-light pair (the same scannability obligation, FR-010).

radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the qr component for the tile corners: md.sys.shape.corner.medium (12dp) via the material3 radius scale — a theme-author decision (no M3 QR artifact exists); modules and finders stay square through the inherited shape tokens (cascade 001).
